dependsOn.guidance: Briefs that must be built before this one — usually the tables this model's relationships point at.

instructions.whoFillsThisIn: Developers (Product can sanity-check the information being stored).
instructions.when: Whenever a page needs to store data. One of these per model/table.
instructions.how: Answer in plain English where you can.
instructions.note: Solution = the folder this file sits in. Table / object name = this file's name.

whatThisModelIs.question: What does this model represent, in one line?
whatThisModelIs.answer: The per-work-item AI policy: what the AI may do with that item, which provider it may use, and at what effort — nothing is allowed without a row here (deny-by-default).

fields.guidance: One entry per piece of data.

entries.rules: unique; must reference a WorkItem row
entries.description: The work item this policy governs (one policy per item)
May the AI read this item's content
May the AI edit code for this item
May the AI generate tests for this item

entries.rules: must reference an AIProvider row when set; when null, no provider is allowed
entries.description: The only AI provider this item may be sent to
The effort tier AI calls for this item use

relationships.guidance: How this model connects to others.

lookupsAndPerformance.question: Which fields do we search or filter on a lot?

retention.question: How long do we keep this data / when is it deleted?

sensitiveFields.question: Any sensitive fields that need extra protection?
sensitiveFields.answer: No — but this table is security-enforcing: every AI call must check it first.

invariants.question: Anything that must always be true?
invariants.answer: One policy row per work item at most. A work item with no policy row, or a policy with allowRead = false, never has its content sent to any provider. Every flag defaults to false (deny-by-default). Deleting a provider must null out (not bypass) the providerId of policies that used it.

changesOverTime.guidance: Each time you come back to change this model, add an entry describing what should change.
